# Varun Choraria

> B2B SaaS marketing consultant and operator. Essays on go-to-market strategy, management, careers, AI, product marketing, and building useful things.

## About

Varun Choraria is a B2B SaaS marketing consultant with about a decade of experience across growth strategy, pipeline, product marketing, and AI. He works through workshops, defined projects, and ongoing marketing leadership. He most recently led marketing at GTM Buddy and is building Grow & Close, a senior-led, AI-native GTM execution studio.

## Writing

- [/blog/](/blog/): every essay, newest first, grouped by year
- [/tags/](/tags/): essays grouped by topic
- [/feed/](/feed/): RSS subscription instructions

## Work

- [/work/](/work/): professional background and current work
- [/about/](/about/): biography, experience, and current focus

## Consulting

- [/consulting/](/consulting/): growth strategy, pipeline, product marketing, AI, and ongoing marketing leadership
- [/ai-b2b-marketing-consultant/](/ai-b2b-marketing-consultant/): AI plans, workshops, working marketing systems, team training, and measurement
- [/b2b-saas-product-marketing-consultant/](/b2b-saas-product-marketing-consultant/): positioning, launches, sales enablement, PLG, and measurable growth

## Side Projects

- [/side-quests/](/side-quests/): public projects, tools, and experiments

## Beyond Work

- [/fun/](/fun/): book, speaking, and podcast work
  - **Book:** *Miracle-preneuring: Why anyone can and should be an entrepreneur* (2016) — self-published, covered by Forbes, Entrepreneur, and 50+ outlets. Available on Amazon and Apple Books.
  - **Speaking:** talks on product marketing and B2B GTM at Wynter, Product Marketing Alliance, AIC Prestige / AIM / Niti Aayog / Microsoft For Startups, and others.
  - **Podcast:** co-hosted *The Edge Podcast for CHROs* (2021, two seasons) — future of work, guests from GoJek, Infosys, Oracle, Razorpay, Doist, and others.
